issues.summary: LDO U1 VIN net lacks an explicit input capacitor — only the output cap C1 (10 uF on +3V3) is present.
issues.description: The schematic net VIN connects J1 pin 1 directly to U1 pin 1 (IN) with no local input capacitor. C1 (10 uF) is on the +3V3 output rail, not the VIN input. Most LDO regulators require an input bulk capacitor (typically 1 uF or greater) for stability and to dampen input-line transients. The design notes acknowledge this gap as an intentional review target.
recommended_actions: Add a bulk input capacitor (≥1 uF ceramic, X5R or X7R) on the VIN net near U1 pin 1.
Check U1's datasheet for minimum/required input capacitance and ESR range.

evidence.note: VIN net: J1-1 → U1-IN, no capacitor on this net in the schematic export.
C1 (10 uF) is on +3V3 output rail: U1-OUT → C1 pin 1, not on VIN.
Design notes explicitly flag this as an intentional review target: 'The reviewer should consider whether U1 needs an input capacitor near VIN.'

issues.summary: No test points on critical power rails (VIN, +3V3).
issues.description: Neither the VIN input rail nor the +3V3 output rail has an accessible test point. During bring-up and field debugging, probing these rails requires desoldering components or probing inside connector pins.
recommended_actions: Add a through-hole or exposed SMD test pad on the +3V3 rail near C1.
Add a test point on VIN near J1 for input-voltage verification.

evidence.note: Board export analysis has no test-point data; component list shows only U1, C1, J1 with no dedicated test pad.

issues.summary: Board lacks fiducial markers for pick-and-place alignment.
issues.description: The board export contains no fiducial components. A minimum of 2 fiducials in diagonally opposite corners is required for automated pick-and-place assembly.
recommended_actions: Add at least 2 standard fiducials (1 mm copper dot, 2 mm solder mask opening) in opposite board corners.
Consider a third fiducial on larger boards for improved accuracy.

evidence.note: Board export components array lists only U1, C1, J1 — no fiducials present.

issues.summary: No mounting holes defined in the board export.
issues.description: The board export does not include any mounting-hole components. A 50×30 mm board needs at least 2-4 mounting holes for secure enclosure installation.
recommended_actions: Add mounting holes (e.g., 3.2 mm for M3 screws) at or near board corners.
Ensure adequate clearance from nearby traces and components.

evidence.note: Board export has no NPTH or mounting-hole entries in the components array.

issues.summary: Power connector J1 lacks polarity markings on silkscreen.
issues.description: J1 is a 2-pin terminal block for power input (VIN and GND). Power connectors must have clear +/- polarity markings on the silkscreen to prevent reverse-polarity connection.
recommended_actions: Add '+' and '-' symbols next to J1 pins on the top silkscreen layer.
Optionally add voltage labels ('+VIN', 'GND') for clarity.

evidence.note: J1 is a TerminalBlock_2Pin with VIN and GND nets — qualifies as a power connector requiring polarity marks.

issues.summary: Board lacks silkscreen identification header (company, board name, revision, date).
issues.description: No board-identification silkscreen is present. Traceability requires company name, board name, revision number, and date.
recommended_actions: Add silkscreen text with: company name, board name ('test_board'), revision (e.g., 'Rev 1.0'), and date.

evidence.note: Board export has no silkscreen-layer data; this is a synthetic test board without silkscreen content.

issues.summary: No blank silkscreen marking area for unit identification (serial number, test notes).
issues.description: A blank silkscreen box or area for handwritten unit identification is not present.
recommended_actions: Add a silkscreen rectangle (e.g., 15 mm × 10 mm) in a visible location, labeled 'S/N' or 'ID'.

evidence.note: Board export has no silkscreen-layer data.

issues.summary: Connector J1 lacks a descriptive silkscreen label beyond its reference designator.
issues.description: J1 is labeled only as 'POWER_IN' in the schematic value field. A descriptive silkscreen label (e.g., 'PWR 12V', 'VIN IN') must appear adjacent to each connector on the board silkscreen.
recommended_actions: Add a silkscreen label near J1 indicating its function, e.g., 'PWR IN' or 'VIN 12V'.

evidence.note: J1 value is 'POWER_IN' in schematic; no board-level silkscreen label exists in the export.

issues.summary: No through-hole ground test point for oscilloscope ground clip.
issues.description: A dedicated through-hole ground test point for scope ground-clip attachment is not present, making oscilloscope measurements less reliable.
recommended_actions: Add a through-hole GND test pad near areas likely to be probed (e.g., near C1 or U1).

evidence.note: Board export has no dedicated ground test point component.

issues.summary: U1 (LDO_REGULATOR) is a generic placeholder — real part number and datasheet required for rating verification.
issues.description: U1 uses the generic lib_id 'Device:LDO' with value 'LDO_REGULATOR'. Without a real part number, its absolute-max ratings, recommended external components, pinout, and thermal characteristics cannot be verified. This is expected for a synthetic test board but must be addressed before fabrication.
recommended_actions: Select a specific LDO part number and add it to the schematic.
Fetch and cite the manufacturer datasheet for rating verification.

evidence.note: U1 lib_id is 'Device:LDO', value is 'LDO_REGULATOR' — no real part number.

verified_checks.summary: LDO output capacitor C1 (10 uF) present on +3V3 rail.

evidence.note: C1 (10 uF, C_0805) connected to U1-OUT (+3V3) — sufficient bulk capacitance for a typical LDO output.

verified_checks.summary: GND plane present on B.Cu layer; GND net spans both layers via 1 via.

evidence.note: Board analysis reports ground_plane_layers: ['B.Cu']; GND signal has segments=2, vias=1 spanning F.Cu and B.Cu.

verified_checks.summary: No floating inputs detected on U1 pins (IN, GND, OUT all connected to nets).

evidence.note: U1 pin 1→VIN net, pin 2→GND net, pin 3→+3V3 net — no floating pins.

verified_checks.summary: No single-pin (orphan) nets detected in the schematic export.

evidence.note: Analysis.single_pin_nets is empty; all nets have ≥2 pin connections.

verified_checks.summary: No I2C bus present on this board — SCH_I2C_001/SCH_I2C_002 not applicable.

evidence.note: Component list contains no I2C slave devices; nets are VIN, GND, +3V3 only.

verified_checks.summary: No external data connector present — EMC_ESD_001 (ESD protection on external connectors) not applicable. J1 is a power terminal block.

evidence.note: J1 value 'POWER_IN', pins VIN/GND — power-only connector, no signal lines requiring ESD protection.

verified_checks.summary: Stackup: 2-layer FR4 (F.Cu / B.Cu), 1.6 mm total thickness.

evidence.note: copper_layer_count=2; copper_stack not present but layers[0]=F.Cu, layers[31]=B.Cu confirm 2-layer build.

verified_checks.summary: No buck/boost converter present — PWR_BUCK_001 through PWR_BUCK_004 not applicable.

evidence.note: U1 is an LDO (linear regulator), not a switching converter. No inductor or switching FET in the design.

verified_checks.summary: No high-speed signals (USB, PCIe, DDR, LVDS, MIPI) present — HS_DIFF_001, HS_SER_001/002, HS_CLK_001 not applicable.

evidence.note: All nets are power/ground: VIN, GND, +3V3. No differential pairs or clock signals detected.

verified_checks.summary: No op-amp or ADC present — AN_OPAMP_001/002/003, AN_ADC_001/002/003 not applicable.

evidence.note: Component list: U1=LDO, C1=capacitor, J1=connector. No analog ICs present.

verified_checks.summary: No high-power dissipation components detected — THM_PWR_001, THM_VIA_001 not applicable.

evidence.note: U1 is a generic LDO with no power-dissipation data; C1 and J1 are passive/connector. No thermal analysis possible without real part data.

verified_checks.summary: Board dimensions: 50 mm × 30 mm, area 1500 mm². No edge clearance warnings in board analysis.

evidence.note: board.width_mm=50, board.height_mm=30; edge_clearance_warnings is empty.

verified_checks.summary: No aerospace-specific requirements detected (no vibration, conformal coat, or aircraft-bus indicators) — AERO_* rules not applicable.

evidence.note: Board description: 'Synthetic board intentionally simple for Claude Code/LM Studio path testing.' No aerospace context.

verified_checks.summary: No MCU outputs present — MS_RST_001 (output lines during reset) not applicable. U1 is an LDO, not a programmable IC.

evidence.note: U1 pin types: IN(power_in), GND(power_in), OUT(power_out). No GPIO or output pins.

verified_checks.summary: No relay or inductive load present — PWR_RELAY_001 not applicable.

evidence.note: Component list: LDO, capacitor, power connector. No relays or motors.

verified_checks.summary: No fuse or overcurrent protection on VIN input — PWR_FUSE_001 not triggered (no fuse present, but this is a synthetic test board).

evidence.note: VIN net connects J1 directly to U1-IN with no series fuse. Real designs should evaluate overcurrent protection.

verified_checks.summary: Ground plane on B.Cu is continuous (no splits detected in board analysis). EMC_PATH_001 not triggered.

evidence.note: ground_plane_layers=['B.Cu']; no split-plane warnings in analysis. GND net has 2 segments but this is expected for a 2-layer board with vias between layers.

verified_checks.summary: C1 (10 uF, C_0805) is a Class 2 ceramic capacitor (X5R/X7R likely). DC bias derating should be verified for the applied voltage.

evidence.note: C1 value=10uF, footprint=C_0805. Applied voltage = +3V3 rail. At 6.3 V or higher rating, X5R/X7R derating is minimal (<10%).

verified_checks.summary: J1 (TerminalBlock_2Pin) is a through-hole connector. Mechanical reinforcement is inherent in the thru-hole pins.

evidence.note: Footprint TerminalBlock_2Pin provides mechanical stability via through-hole mounting pins. MEC_CONN_001 not triggered.

verified_checks.summary: VIN to +3V3 voltage drop: LDO dropout must be verified once a real part is selected. Typical LDO dropout is 200-500 mV.

evidence.note: U1 is an LDO — VIN must exceed VOUT (+3V3) by the dropout voltage. Real part selection will determine minimum VIN.

verified_checks.summary: Visual layer review: no images available for this synthetic test board (no PNG exports present). All findings are based on JSON data only.

evidence.note: No *-img-*.png files found in exports/ directory. This is expected for a synthetic test board without real EAGLE/KiCad source files.

cross_checks.summary: LDO regulator power chain: VIN → U1(IN) → +3V3(OUT), with GND return on B.Cu plane. C1 (10 uF output cap) present; input cap missing.
cross_checks.description: The power chain is J1(VIN/GND) → U1(LDO) → +3V3. GND returns via B.Cu plane with 1 via between layers. C1 provides output bulk capacitance but no input capacitor exists on VIN. The LDO's dropout voltage and minimum input capacitance cannot be verified without a real part number.

evidence.note: VIN net: J1-1 → U1 pin 1 (IN). +3V3 net: U1 pin 3 (OUT) → C1 pin 1. GND net: J1-2 → U1 pin 2 (GND), C1 pin 2.
Ground plane on B.Cu; GND spans both layers via 1 via.

cross_checks.summary: Board-level DFT/DFM readiness: fiducials, mounting holes, test points, silkscreen all missing.
cross_checks.description: This synthetic test board lacks all major DFT/DFM elements: no fiducials for pick-and-place, no mounting holes, no test points on power rails, no silkscreen ID header, and no polarity marks on the power connector. A production-ready design would need all of these.

evidence.note: Board export components array: only U1, C1, J1 — no fiducials, mounting holes, or test pads.
No silkscreen-layer data in board export; stackup JSON confirms 2-layer build.
